title: justicia petiolaris subsp. incerta
intro: Justicia petiolaris subsp. incerta, also known as the yellow justicia or yellow snapwort, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting respiratory health, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-diabetic agent. The yellow justicia can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
